message:
feat(web): Add HGTOverlay for horizontal gene transfer island detection

Implements compositional analysis to detect putative HGT islands:
- Sliding window GC% deviation from genome average
- Karlin dinucleotide signature (ρ-statistic) analysis
- Composite HGT probability scoring (0-100 scale)
- Multi-track genome browser visualization using GenomeTrack primitive
- Interactive island selection with detailed tooltips
- Hotkey: Alt+H

Also adds missing GenomeTrackSegment, GenomeTrackInteraction, and
ArcInteraction types to primitives/types.ts for full primitive support.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
